Country.name: Country
Country.description: The Country table stores a list of countries used for reference or categorization within the system.

League.name: League
League.description: The League table contains a standardized list of top-tier professional football leagues from 11 European countries, used to categorize and reference competitions within the sports data system.

name_values.content: Belgium Jupiler League(9.1%), England Premier League(9.1%), France Ligue 1(9.1%), Germany 1. Bundesliga(9.1%), Italy Serie A(9.1%), Netherlands Eredivisie(9.1%), Poland Ekstraklasa(9.1%), Portugal Liga ZON Sagres(9.1%), Scotland Premier League(9.1%), Spain LIGA BBVA(9.1%), Switzerland Super League(9.1%)

Match.name: Match
Match.description: The Match table stores detailed records of football (soccer) matches, including season information and home team goal outcomes, supporting analysis of match results and team performance across multiple seasons.

quality_issues.description: TEXT field storing numeric values (100% numeric, 25979/25979 non-empty)
TEXT field storing numeric values (100% numeric, 25979/25979 non-empty)

Player.name: Player
Player.description: The Player table stores core information about individual players, including their unique identifiers and associated attributes.

quality_issues.description: TEXT field storing numeric values (100% numeric, 11060/11060 non-empty)

Player_Attributes.name: Player_Attributes
Player_Attributes.description: The Player_Attributes table stores detailed performance and behavioral characteristics of football players, including preferred foot and work rates, to support player evaluation and tactical analysis.

quality_issues.description: TEXT field storing numeric values (100% numeric, 183978/183978 non-empty)

Team.name: Team
Team.description: The Team table stores core information about organizational teams, including their identifiers, names, and associated attributes.

Team_Attributes.name: Team_Attributes
Team_Attributes.description: The Team_Attributes table captures detailed tactical and stylistic characteristics of football teams, including build-up play, chance creation, and defensive strategies, to support performance analysis and strategic decision-making.

quality_issues.description: TEXT field storing numeric values (100% numeric, 1458/1458 non-empty)
